THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROEHL, MICHAEL ARTHUR, DAVID SUED AS DOE 1 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2445 - 24TH ST, S.F., STAYED UNTIL MAR-11-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. IF DEFT PAY $400- TO PLTF BY 3/1/97 5PM EVICTION POST- PONED TILL 3/31/97. IF DEFT VACATED PLTF WVS BACK RENT & DAMAGES. FAILURE TO VACATE PLTF TO HAVE AMENDED JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE $2,361- RENTS&DAMAGES, $700- ATTY FEES; $225- COSTS. THE ABOVE AS TO DFT DAVID ARTHUR,DEFAULT AS TO MICHAEL ROEHL
